auth.pocHint: POC mock login — no real credentials required.

welcome.headline: Welcome to {{brand}} Casino
welcome.subtitle: Design-system POC — switch brand, theme, and language.

pages.casinoBody: Game catalogue coming later. Mock data only.
pages.profileBody: Sign in to see balance, deposit, and account controls.
pages.profileLoggedInBody: You are signed in with the mock player account.

docs.title: Design system
docs.subtitle: Foundations, live tokens, and exports for Blixx DS across brands and themes.

overview.intro: Blixx DS is a multi-brand casino design system POC. Semantic CSS variables drive Tailwind utilities so the same components adapt when brand, theme scheme, or light/dark mode changes.
overview.architecture: Preferences set data-brand, data-theme, and a light|dark class on the html element. Brand CSS files override the token values; components consume utilities like bg-primary and text-foreground.
overview.brandsBody: Three casino brands for scheme testing.
overview.themesBody: Each brand has default and alt schemes, plus light and dark modes.
overview.breakpointBody: Desktop shell (left nav) from 1280px up; mobile bottom nav below.
overview.tokensBody: Browse live computed values and export them for tooling.

tokens.live: Live values for the active brand / theme / mode

docs.exportBody: Download or copy the currently resolved token set in the format you need.

components.intro: Core primitives wired to semantic tokens. Switch brand/theme via the debug menu to preview.
components.button: Variants map hover and pressed states to dedicated token steps.
